input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The wall has photos and a calendar; water bottle stacks are on the floor. A person in dark trousers walks by. A person in a teal shirt with navy sleeves and blue jeans stands by the chair, reaching for it.
[6-8] The person in the teal shirt sits at the desk. Outdoors, a man in a floral t-shirt and backward cap holds a device, smiling near cars.
[8-10] In a classroom, a man in a blue varsity jacket with white sleeves and number 89 gestures near a projector screen with 3D models and a green chalkboard. A Canadian flag is shown.
[10-12] A map labels Yukon, British Columbia, and Alberta. In a classroom, a person with blue-streaked hair faces a chalkboard while students write.

[18-20] A man in a patterned black and white sweater and headband on a profile layout, then a vertical video of a man with glasses and a dark blue t-shirt with white stripe gesturing. [20-22] An Instagram post by user thunayyan16 shows a hallway with a skateboard leaning against a wall beside a woven basket, with Arabic caption and comments. [22-24] A split screen displays two tweets: one with a yellow sticky note reading "You know you look beautiful today" and another with celebrity photos and Arabic text. Then a man in a teal and navy shirt writing at a desk with a laptop and bottles. [24-28] The man faces a laptop displaying a video, using a mouse near bottles and a wall covered in photos and a calendar, then holds a smartphone in both hands, looking down at the screen, shifting attention from the laptop.

[28-30] A man wearing a grey sweater with white patterns falls backward onto a beige carpeted floor. The scene cuts to an indoor trampoline park with bright green padding and black mats, where several people are jumping and walking. [30-32] A person in a grey shirt lands on a black trampoline mat. The scene cuts to a close-up of a man wearing a grey t-shirt with a bird graphic, balancing a green turtle plush on his shoulder while standing in front of a carnival booth filled with colorful stuffed animal prizes. [32-36] A man in a black hoodie sits at a white desk, using a laptop trackpad near a white bowl of orange cereal and a red coffee cup. He holds a yellow pen and writes on a piece of paper while looking at the laptop screen. Behind him, a corkboard wall displays photos and a calendar, with stacks of water bottles visible in the background.

recent_thinks: [12-14] A man wearing a grey hoodie stirs a pot on a white electric stove next to a silver kettle and black pan. The scene cuts to a laundry room where he places clothes into a white Maytag dryer beside coin-operated machines and a patterned basket.

[14-16] A group of men wearing colorful sports jerseys sit together on a green soccer field, smiling and raising their arms while one man in the front holds a selfie stick. The final shot displays a grid of YouTube video thumbnails with Arabic titles and view counts.

[16-18] A Twitter profile screenshot for @Thunayyan16 appears on the right side against a black background, displaying 55.5K followers and location details. Below it, an Instagram profile for thunayyan16 is shown with 23.5k followers, a bio listing a Snapchat handle, and an email address.

[36-38] A man in a grey t-shirt sits at a white desk, holding a yellow pen over paper while looking at a laptop screen. Water bottles and a corkboard with photos are visible in the background. This scene mirrors the previous setting, but the man is now wearing a grey shirt instead of a black hoodie.

queries.question: Where is the corkboard covered with photos positioned in the office scene? A. On the street behind the man B. On the wall to the right of the desk C. In the lower left portion of the screen D. On the floor in front of the machines

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A black screen displays white Arabic text "ثنیان خال" in the bottom right. [18-20] A man in a patterned black and white sweater and headband on a profile layout, then a vertical video of a man with glasses and a dark blue t-shirt with white stripe gesturing. [20-22] An Instagram post

[126-128] A man in a striped shirt and glasses holds a white paper, smiling indoors near a lamp and bookshelf. The view cuts to a parking lot featuring a white car and green dumpsters, where a person in white walks away from the camera toward a brick apartment building. [128-134] A man in a white t-shirt and backward cap stands indoors gesturing with open hands. Behind him against beige walls are a floor lamp, a hanging blue shirt, and a tripod. He shifts position to reveal a white desk with a laptop, water bottles, and a corkboard with photos.

From 134s to 142s, a man wearing a white t-shirt and a backward grey cap stands indoors, speaking directly to the camera. He initially gestures with open hands, then briefly lowers his arms to his sides around 138s before raising them back to chest level with palms facing inward to emphasize his points. Behind him, a white desk holds a laptop and water bottles near a corkboard. To the right, a blue shirt hangs on the beige wall next to a black tripod. The background remains static throughout the clip as he continues his presentation.

A man wearing a white t-shirt and a backward grey cap stands indoors. He raises his right hand, pointing his index finger upward toward the upper left area. A black rectangular overlay with the text "2014" appears near his finger. He maintains the pose as a second overlay displaying "23" appears directly beneath the first. He then points toward the left side, and a third overlay reading "500,000" appears below "23", creating a vertical list. Finally, he points his finger upward and to the right; the previous text overlays disappear, and a new black overlay with "2015" appears in the upper right area near his pointing finger.

[150-152] A man in a white t-shirt and backward cap points his right index finger toward the right side. A black rectangular overlay displaying "52" appears beneath the existing "2015" text box in the upper right area.

[154-156] The man points his right index finger upward. The previous text overlays vanish, replaced by a black box displaying "2016" in the upper right.
[156-158] He lowers his right hand. The "2016" overlay disappears, and a new black box displaying "???" appears in the same location.

[14-16] A group of men wearing colorful sports jerseys sit together on a green soccer field, smiling and raising their arms while one man in the front holds a selfie stick. The final shot displays a grid of YouTube video thumbnails with Arabic titles and view counts.

[52-54] A man in a grey t-shirt sits at a white desk holding a yellow pen over paper while viewing a laptop screen. The scene cuts to the man wearing a black hoodie, typing on the laptop keyboard with a white bowl of orange cereal and a red cup on the desk.

[158-160] The man wearing a white t-shirt and a backward grey cap brings his hands together in front of his chest. The black rectangular overlay displaying three white question marks vanishes from the upper right section of the beige wall behind him, leaving the wall space empty.

queries.question: Where is the corkboard covered with photos positioned in the office scene? A. On the street behind the man B. On the wall to the right of the desk C. In the lower left portion of the screen D. On the floor in front of the machines
